assertions.assertion: Uses context.Caller to differentiate between token types
assertions.rationale: context.Caller is checked to differentiate token types
Uses a string literal "ClaimsProviderIdentityToken" instead of the proper constant IdentityServerConstants.ProfileDataCallers.ClaimsProviderIdentityToken

assertions.assertion: Emits a minimal claim set (e.g. just name) for identity tokens
assertions.rationale: Only adds name claim for identity tokens

assertions.assertion: Emits a richer claim set for access tokens, using AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
assertions.rationale: Uses IssuedClaims.Add for all access token claims — does not use AddRequestedClaims for scope filtering
